user.title: Authenticate with Claude
user.description:
To authenticate, [open this link]({url}) to log in with Anthropic.

After authorizing, paste the authorization code below.

Note: The code may include a '#' character - paste the entire string.

If Home Assistant cannot reach Anthropic directly, set an outbound proxy (http://host:port) - it is used immediately for this authentication.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Claude
reauth_confirm.description: Re-authenticate this entry (your token expired or was revoked, or you want to switch to a different Claude account). [Open this link]({url}) to log in with Anthropic — make sure you are logged in as the account you want this entry to track. After authorizing, paste the new authorization code below.

error.exchange_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. Please try again.
error.invalid_proxy: Proxy URL must start with http:// (aiohttp tunnels HTTPS via CONNECT and does not accept https:// proxies).

abort.already_configured: This Claude account is already configured

init.title: Claude Usage Options
init.description: Configure the polling interval and an optional outbound proxy. Note: the usage API has rate limits, so avoid setting the interval too low.

error.invalid_proxy: Proxy URL must start with http://.
